description.en: Starts the asynchronous process of unsubscribing from the push service, returning aPromisethat resolves to a boolean value when the current subscription is successfully unregistered.

excerpt.es: Starts the asynchronous process of unsubscribing from the push service, returning aPromisethat resolves to a boolean value when the current subscription is successfully unregistered.
